objective: Complete the independently verifiable F-0098 exam_report presentation partition by grouping immutable question results under their authoritative paper_section and question_group public identity, rendering each group heading once and calculating a display-only group score subtotal from the existing result facts. Preserve standalone questions, result ordering, scoring status, learner visibility and immutable legacy reports; do not change snapshot production, scoring, persistence, permissions, mock_exam navigation or organization training.
blockedFiles: permission, entitlement, role or learner visibility changes
dependency, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push
F-0096, F-0097, F-0099 or another independent finding

authoritativeChainEvidence.requirement: Module 02 section 3.7 requires question_group to remain a visible structural container with a system-computed subtotal; F-0098 requires reports to preserve group hierarchy rather than present repeated flat children.
authoritativeChainEvidence.producer: The closed foundation commit 885558610 records paperSectionTitle, questionGroupPublicId and questionGroupTitle on each immutable report result and emits a question_group summary without changing scoring facts.
authoritativeChainEvidence.consumer: StudentExamReportPage currently parses those fields but still renders one undifferentiated flat result list, repeating the same group label on every child and exposing no group subtotal.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: student-mock-exam-report-ui is the direct caller and regression surface; no server mock, route, repository, schema or migration change is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: This task closes only the exam_report grouped presentation partition. F-0098 remains open_partitioned for grouped mock_exam navigation and final independent acceptance.

resumeAnchor.task: grouped mock_exam navigation and final independent acceptance
resumeAnchor.condition: after grouped report closeout, continue the same finding without reopening the foundation or expanding into organization training

validationEvidence.tddRed: group heading absent, noncontiguous repeated group identity reordered, and non-decimal score text was coerced before the fail-closed fixes
validationEvidence.build: pass: 100 static pages; pre-existing NFT trace warning only
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: pass: public identity is authoritative; same-title distinct groups stay separate; conflicting, incomplete or noncontiguous group identity fails closed without reordering; invalid or pending subtotal facts are not fabricated
